lines.text: Pools at Disney's All-Star Music Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's All-Star Music Resort
Rock out as you cool off inside the guitar-shaped Calypso Pool and the keyboard-shaped Piano Pool. Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.

Go for a dip at the Calypso Pool, home to a colorful fountain of the Three Caballeros. Featuring Donald Duck, José Carioca and Panchito in the center of the 251,418-gallon, guitar-shaped pool, the fountain lightheartedly shoots water at nearby swimmers. Bongos and maracas line the pool area and add to the charming musical theme.
For little ones, a kiddie pool is located nearby behind Melody Hall.
For even more fun, Disney movies are screened on select nights at the Calypso Pool.

Strike a chord at the Piano Pool, a grand piano shaped swimming hole featuring black and white keys. This 106,036 gallon leisure pool is the perfect place to relax and unwind after a busy day at the parks.

Let’s make a splash at Calypso Pool! Join us for family-friendly activities each day, like themed pool parties and other cool activities. Fun offerings include themed pool games, relays, trivia and more! See a Recreation Host for additional details.
Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Complimentary towels are provided at all pools.
